body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'HOW IT WORKS'.

title.desc: A summary of the process, e.g., 'From verified revenue to funded growth'.

body_2.desc: A step in the process, e.g., 'SME'.

body_3.desc: A step in the process, e.g., 'Needs working capital'.

subtitle_2.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'Apply & Connect'.

body_4.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'SME submits a capital request and connects verified revenue '.

subtitle_4.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'Assess & Grade'.

body_5.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'FundLok scores repayment capacity and assigns a risk grade f'.

body_6.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'Investors review transparent listings and fund the deal.'.

subtitle_8.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'Repay from revenue'.

body_7.desc: Description of the step, e.g., 'SME repays a share of monthly revenue until the return cap i'.

body_8.desc: A step in the process, e.g., 'INVESTOR'.

body_9.desc: A step in the process, e.g., 'Earns transparent yield'.
